# Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (2019)

Jurisdiction: Thailand
Region: TH
Citation: Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562
Authority: Thailand PDPC / Royal Gazette
Source URL: https://www.pdpc.or.th/
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, retention_deletion, security_breach, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: Thailand PDPA, PDPC, personal data controller, personal data processor, sensitive personal data, cross-border transfer, 泰国

## Summary
Thailand's general personal data protection law with controller and processor obligations, consent and other legal bases, rights, sensitive data controls, breach notification, and cross-border transfer provisions.

## Key compliance obligations
- Give privacy notice and identify legal basis for processing.
- Use contracts or instructions for processors.
- Support rights including access, portability, objection, erasure, restriction, and withdrawal.
- Notify personal data breaches where required.
